clause_text: This agreement shall remain in force until terminated by either party with 30 days written notice. Confidentiality of all proprietary information must be maintained.
The supplier shall be liable for all damages caused due to breach of contract without any limitation of liability.
The parties agree to comply with GDPR and ensure proper data protection practices.
This agreement does not explicitly state confidentiality obligations.
The company shall not be held liable beyond the contract value in case of indirect damages.
